mechanisms.description: For web apps with redirect URL
For server-to-server with no UI — simplest for integrations

authentication.refresh_token_lifetime: Never expires until revoked by user

concurrency_limits.notes: Per org per app. Additionally, sub-concurrency limit of 10 for heavy APIs (Convert Lead, Import, etc.)

rate_limits.record_limits: Max 100 records per Insert/Update/Upsert call. Max 500 records per Tag/Untag call

error_dictionary.description: Access token is invalid or expired
error_dictionary.solution: Refresh access token using refresh token. Access tokens valid for 1 hour. Max 15 active tokens per refresh token.

error_dictionary.description: Made too many OAuth token requests continuously
error_dictionary.real_response: {"error_description":"You have made too many requests continuously. Please try again after some time.","error":"Access Denied","status":"failure"}
error_dictionary.solution: Wait before generating more tokens. Max 10 grant tokens per 10 min per client ID. Max 10 access tokens per 10 min per refresh token.
Check remaining credits via API. Optimize operations — use UPSERT instead of separate INSERT/UPDATE. Wait for rolling 24h window reset.
Implement request queuing. Reduce parallel requests. Sub-concurrency limit of 10 for heavy operations (Convert Lead, etc.)
Implement exponential backoff. Check edition limits. Consider upgrading plan for higher limits.
Check module metadata for mandatory fields. Ensure all required fields are provided.

error_dictionary.description: Record with same unique field value already exists
error_dictionary.solution: Use UPSERT with duplicate check field parameter instead of INSERT.

community_constraints.issue: Data center mismatch causes mysterious auth failures
community_constraints.detail: Zoho has 6 data centers (us, eu, in, au, jp, cn). Using wrong domain (e.g., zohoapis.com for EU accounts) causes silent auth failures
community_constraints.workaround: Derive API domain from user's Zoho Accounts API location. Never hardcode the domain. Use /crm/v8/org to verify.

community_constraints.issue: Self-Client grant token only valid for 3 minutes
community_constraints.workaround: Generate grant token and exchange for access token immediately within 3 minutes. Automate the full flow in script.

community_constraints.issue: Max 15 active access tokens per refresh token is easy to hit
community_constraints.workaround: Reuse active access tokens instead of generating new ones for each request. Track token expiration (1 hour) and proactively refresh.

use_cases: CRM data sync between Zoho and other platforms
Bulk import/export of records via APIs
